cron parser + scheduler loop + schedules service implemented; 15 tests pass

review-fix job: poll in-review PRs via gh, classify actionable (changes-requested/failing CI), re-materialize worktree, dispatch claude to fix, commit, push, comment + re-request review. e2e tested (3 cases inc. unpushed-prior-commit).
nightly-stringer job: stringer scan --delta → /scan-triage claude prompt → beads per project. e2e tested (triage-to-beads + zero-signal no-op).
orphan-grooming job: bucket open non-epic tickets with no parent under a reusable grooming epic. e2e tested (bucketing + idempotency).
